title: Who Gives a Fly — Structured Evidence Schema
description: Validates the three ground-truth evidence blocks that upgrade D3, D4, and D5 from inferred to validated scoring. Add these blocks to component entries in pathways.json.

species_id.description: Species identifier matching pathways.json metadata.species keys.

evidence_tier.description: Quality tier. Only 'validated' (human-reviewed) scores are used in final risk calculation.

pmid_digits.description: PubMed ID without prefix. Digits only.

pmid.description: PubMed ID without prefix. Null if unpublished or preprint.

curated_date_iso.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Note: schema enforces pattern only; validator does not check calendar validity.

regulatory_context_entry.description: Structured regulatory context for one human↔model species pair. Directly scores D3.

upstream_inputs_conserved.description: Are the activating signals and upstream kinases/ligands conserved between species?

downstream_targets_conserved.description: Do the same target genes respond downstream in both species?

ptm_sites_conserved.description: Are key phosphorylation, ubiquitination, and SUMOylation sites present in model organism?

tissue_expression_overlap.description: Fraction of disease-relevant tissues where expression is equivalent (0 = none, 1 = identical).

known_rewiring.description: Is there documented evidence of regulatory rewiring between species?

score.description: D3 score for this species pair (0–5).

pmids.description: Supporting literature (PMIDs as digits-only strings; null allowed for unpublished/preprint).

curator.description: Name or ORCID of curator who verified this entry.

phenotypic_evidence_entry.description: One experimental result documenting model organism phenotypic equivalence to human disease. Directly scores D4.

score.description: D4 contribution score for this evidence (0–5).

description.description: Plain-language description of the experimental result and its relevance.

supports_validity.description: True if this evidence supports translational equivalence; false if it contradicts it.

caveats.description: Known limitations of this evidence (e.g. different tumour spectrum, developmental vs adult).

phenotype_match.description: Degree of phenotypic match between model and human disease.

pharmacological_evidence_entry.description: One drug-response data point in a model organism. Directly scores D5.

concordance.description: True = model response predicts human response. False = discordant. Null = unknown/untested.

clinical_stage.description: Highest clinical development stage for this drug-target pair.

description: Top-level wrapper validating a single pathway component's evidence blocks.

component_id.description: Must match an existing component id in pathways.json.

regulatory_context.description: Keyed by human↔model species pair string e.g. 'human_drosophila'. Scores D3.

phenotypic_evidence.description: Array of experimental evidence entries. Scores D4.

pharmacological_evidence.description: Array of drug-response evidence entries. Scores D5.
